packageRules.description: Track the Chunkah version tag only; this repo intentionally does not pin a digest for it.
Dependabot owns GitHub Actions version updates (see .github/dependabot.yml); disable Renovate's github-actions manager to avoid duplicate PRs. Renovate still owns the Chunkah custom manager above.
Containerfile base-image ARGs are resolved at build time by this repo's own CI input resolution (ci_tools/resolve_build_inputs.py), not hand-pinned versions Renovate should track.
